title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.44.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | minor | `v1.43.0` -> `v1.44.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage</summary>

### [`v1.44.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.44.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.43.0...v1.44.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to version v1.43.0 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1370](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1370)
-   Fix accessing containers and image locks by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1369](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1369)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.1 to 1.10.2 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1372](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1372)
-   pkg/archive: Use archive_unix.go on FreeBSD by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1371](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1371)
-   drivers/overlay: Notify the user if the backing filesystem is not supported with OverlayFS by [@​aarontomlin](https://togithub.com/aarontomlin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1374](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1374)
-   Pen-ultimate? bunch of warning cleanups by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1377](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1377)
-   Remove lockfile.Locker.RecursiveLock (alternative to [#​1344](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/issues/1344)) by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1376](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1376)
-   Make {container, layer, image} store APIs private by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1345](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1345)
-   container deletion - EBUSY improvement by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1382](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1382)
-   Two misc. cleanups by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1380](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1380)
-   Factor out the infrastructure for reading primary + additional stores by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1384](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1384)
-   Consolidate the common parts of simple writers by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1383](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1383)
-   Fix layer locking in CreateContainer by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1387](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1387)
-   Lock layers only for reading by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1386](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1386)
-   Simplify the name update call stack by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1385](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1385)
-   Remove a manual layerStore.Touch() call from store.Shutdown() by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1381](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1381)
-   Correctly handle lockfiles without writes by [@​alexlarsson](https://togithub.com/alexlarsson) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1391](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1391)
-   overlay: try harder with more layers by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1375](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1375)
-   Another bunch of warning cleanups by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1364](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1364)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.12.0 to 0.12.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1390](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1390)
-   Fixup a comment in the overlay driver by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1392](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1392)
-   Use testing.T.Setenv by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1393](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1393)
-   Move locking responsibility from store.go to the container/image/layer stores by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1395](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1395)
-   Fix lockfiles never detecting changes by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1396](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1396)
-   Don't create $root/{mounts,tmp}, which we don't use by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1398](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1398)
-   fix break during unmount by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1401](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1401)
-   Fix locking bugs by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1400](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1400)
-   Add TestLockfileMultiprocessModified() by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1397](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1397)
-   pkg/lockfile.TestLockfileMultiprocessModified(): check for wait errors by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1402](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1402)
-   Add support for exporting and importing file flags on FreeBSD by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1378](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1378)
-   Only read storage.conf once by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1404](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1404)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/BurntSushi/toml from 1.2.0 to 1.2.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1409](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1409)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.8.0 to 1.8.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1408](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1408)
-   API break: Remove Lockfile.Locked by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1399](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1399)
-   Fix some warnings again by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1412](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1412)
-   Don’t silently ignore errors when decoding JSON or deleting incomplete layers by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1406](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1406)
-   overlay: drop relLowers workaround by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1411](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1411)
-   Expose System wide config file by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1405](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1405)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.4 to 0.9.5 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1416](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1416)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.11 to 1.15.12 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1413](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1413)
-   overlay: fix call to clone on s390x by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1418](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1418)
-   unshare: fix creating a userns when running as root by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1415](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1415)
-   fix inconsitent go build tags by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1417](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1417)
-   chunked: use io.github.containers by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1419](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1419)
-   \[main] Recreate missing backingFsBlockDev on setting xfs project quota by [@​saschagrunert](https://togithub.com/saschagrunert) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1325](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1325)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​alexlarsson](https://togithub.com/alexlarsson) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1391](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1391)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.43.0...v1.44.0

</details>
